steps.title: Substitute x equals 2 into the function definition
steps.content:
We have $f(x) = x^2 + x + 31$ and need to find $f(2)$. Replace $x$ with \$2$:

$$f(2) = 2^2 + 2 + 31$$

steps.title: Evaluate the expression
steps.content:
Calculate step by step:

$$f(2) = 4 + 2 + 31 = 37$$

The value of $f(2)$ is \$37$.
